Atari LADS image from Appendix B-4 (MLX), checksum-guided resync + 2 scan-verified
byte patches (reference/lads_atari.patches). $8000..$9AB7 (6840 bytes),
entry $8000 -> JMP $92CB. ALL 1138 MLX lines pass checksum -> fully byte-exact.

DECOMPILED SOURCE: dist/atari-disk/lads.asm reassembles BYTE-EXACT to this image
(regen: tools/decompile.sh atari). Auto-labels; C64-template naming is the next layer.
